name: alerio-readwise-miniapp
description: MentraOS mini app for glasses video/audio ingestion, storage, and approval-gated Readwise processing.

scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/book-video-processor.js && node --check src/domain.js && node --check src/ocr.js && node --check src/stream-recorder.js && node --check src/transcription.js && node --check src/video-worker.js && node --check scripts/dev-all.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/public-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/run-sandbox.mjs && node --check scripts/setup.mjs
